proposal.objective: Ship a reviewer-grade verification release package before mainnet launch.
formal_scope_items: Close agreed theorem gaps in the Lean refinement boundary.
Document proof assumptions and non-goals in VERIFICATION.md.
test_scope_items: Extend differential fuzzing for swap/add/remove sequences.
Add invariant campaign checks for LP accounting and reserve consistency.
security_scope_items: Run Slither with the repository detector policy and triage report.
Address actionable findings or formally document accepted risk.
ci_scope_items: Ensure Lean/Solidity/Security CI gates pass with pinned toolchains.
Publish a review package artifact with manifest, logs, and checksums.
out_of_scope_items: Protocol governance, oracle design, and tokenomics strategy.
New feature development unrelated to agreed verification scope.

sow.assumption_1: Client provides repository access and a technical point of contact within 2 business days.
sow.assumption_2: Client codebase remains materially stable during the sprint window.
